qoq_changes: Revenue grew sequentially to $10.24 billion from an implied $9.83 billion in Q1
Net income grew sequentially to $1.89 billion from an implied $1.54 billion in Q1
new_risks: No specific new risks were detailed in the provided excerpt, though Item 1A indicates risk factors are present in the full filing.
management_tone: Bullish; the company demonstrated strong operating leverage with net income growing significantly faster than revenue, alongside continued aggressive capital return via share repurchases.
analyst_note: Salesforce delivered a highly profitable quarter, balancing nearly 10% top-line growth with a 32% surge in net income and returning over $2.2 billion to shareholders through buybacks, signaling strong execution on margin expansion.
